headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://checkout.razorpay.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.razorpay.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.vercel.app; frame-src 'self' https://api.razorpay.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.supabase.co https://*.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
